"D:\CLion 2026.1.1\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\city_manager.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\city_manager.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\city_manager.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\gcc.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\city_manager.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o city_manager.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libcity_manager.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\city_manager.dir\linkLibs.rsp
